description_long: This object is a cubic structure with exterior surfaces clad in a reddish-orange brick pattern, resembling a small building or garage. One side features a wooden door with a black frame, while another side has a black-framed window with blue-tinted glass panes. The roof is flat and also covered in the same brick pattern. The interior, visible from one view, contains a kitchen and dining area with green furniture and black marble flooring, suggesting it is a functional enclosed space. The overall appearance is that of a compact, modern brick outbuilding or garage, suitable for urban or residential environments.
description: A cubic brick structure with a door, window, and visible interior kitchen, resembling a small urban outbuilding or garage.
description_view_0: A solid brick-patterned wall with no openings or features visible.
description_view_1: The open side reveals a furnished interior with a kitchen and dining area, including green furniture and black marble flooring.
description_view_2: A brick wall with a centrally placed wooden door framed in black.
description_view_3: A brick wall featuring a black-framed window with blue-tinted glass panes.
attribute_installation_method: mortared and set on a concrete foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering or aging; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: forms part of a continuous wall or standalone outbuilding
